findings.message: write-good.Passive (warning): 'is supposed' may be passive voice. Use active voice if you can.
write-good.E-Prime (suggestion): Try to avoid using 'is'.
write-good.TooWordy (warning): 'It is' is too wordy.

`updated` is earlier than `date`.
Body contains an `# h1`. The page template emits the h1 from `title`; body headings start at `h2`.
findings.excerpt: # This heading should not be here

findings.message: Image `../../assets/a11y-bot-form.png` has empty alt text. Alt text conveys the information in the image, not the filename.
`description` is 165 chars — over the ~155-char SERP limit. Add a short `seoDescription` override.
`title` is 89 chars — over the ~60-char SERP limit. Add a short `seoTitle` override.
No `tags`. Tags feed the writing index and topical grouping.
Image `/images/from-public.png` is not a relative `src/assets/` reference. Images in `public/` get no optimisation and no intrinsic dimensions, which costs CLS.
mechanical fix: The updated date (2026-07-01) precedes the published date (2026-07-18), which is logically impossible for an 'updated' field.
buried lede: The post has no discernible lede at all — there is no opening statement of what the post is about or what the reader should take away.
findings.excerpt:
A refacrtor of the review pipeline was the damanging part; the accessibiltiy work
was fine.
findings.evidence: The only body text is a single sentence fragment with no context, no subject introduction, and no conclusion. There is nothing for a reader to orient around.

findings.message: Suggested edit was refused because it rewrites prose the model itself flagged as an editorial judgment, not a mechanical defect. Three clear misspellings: 'refacrtor' → 'refactor', 'damanging' → 'damaging', 'accessibiltiy' → 'accessibility'.
findings.excerpt: A refacrtor of the review pipeline was the damanging part; the accessibiltiy work
findings.evidence: The model proposed replacing this with: "A refactor of the review pipeline was the damaging part; the accessibility work". Rewriting a claim the model flagged as overclaiming, unsupported, or contradictory is an editorial act, and the Steward never makes those automatically (design rule 1) — however small the edit. Decide this one yourself.

findings.message: self containment: This image has no alt text, making it unintelligible when extracted or consumed by an AI answer engine.
findings.evidence: An empty alt attribute provides no semantic content; any system reading this section in isolation gets no information about what the image depicts.

patches.rationale: cspell: "refacrtor" is not a word; "refactor" is the unambiguous correction.
cspell: "damanging" is not a word; "damaging" is the unambiguous correction.
cspell: "accessibiltiy" is not a word; "accessibility" is the unambiguous correction.
The updated date (2026-07-01) precedes the published date (2026-07-18), which is logically impossible for an 'updated' field.
